sourcePrompt: A T-54 main battle tank, the NVA's Soviet-pattern armor, about six and a half meters of hull with the 100mm gun stretching it past nine. A low sloped hull under a smooth half-egg dome turret, the long gun wearing a bore evacuator near the muzzle; five big road wheels per side with a distinct gap between the first and second. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
